zh.lifeSummary: 當Lawrence John Cheney於1566年出生在英國波克夏藍布時，他的父親Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough26歲，母親Agnes Cusse24歲。他於1588年與Julian Waldron在英國英格蘭波克夏藍布結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1643年11月2日在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利享年77歲，埋葬在英國波克夏藍布。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lawrence John Cheney于1566年出生在英国波克夏藍布时，他的父亲Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough26岁，母亲Agnes Cusse24岁。他于1588年与Julian Waldron在英国英格兰波克夏藍布结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1643年11月2日在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利享年77岁，埋葬在英国波克夏藍布。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Lawrence John Cheney was born in 1566, in Lambourn, Berkshire, England, his father, Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough, was 26 and his mother, Agnes Cusse, was 24. He married Julian Waldron in 1588, in Lambourn, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 2 November 1643, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 77, and was buried in Lambourn, Berkshire, England.

fr.London, London, England: London, London Township, Monroe, Michigan, États-Unis
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lawrence John Cheney est né en 1566, à Lambourn, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Cusse, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Julian Waldron en 1588, à Lambourn, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 2 novembre 1643, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Lambourn, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lawrence John Cheney 1566 in Lambourn, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough 26 und seine Mutter Agnes Cusse 24. Er hat 1588 in Lambourn, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Julian Waldron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 2. November 1643 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Lambourn, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence John Cheney è nato il nel 1566 nel Lambourn, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Cusse, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Julian Waldron nel 1588, nel Lambourn, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 2 novembre 1643, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Lambourn, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lawrence John Cheneyが1566年にイギリスバークシュアイアランボウルンで生まれた時，父Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lamboughは26歳，母Agnes Cusseは24歳であった。1588年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアランボウルンでJulian Waldronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1643年11月2日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーで77歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアランボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence John Cheney(이)가 1566년 영국 버크실르 램우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Cusse(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1588년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 램우른에서 Julian Waldron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1643년 11월 2일 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 램우른에 묻혔다.

pt.Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, England: Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lawrence John Cheney nasceu em 1566, em Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Cusse, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Julian Waldron em 1588, em Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de novembro de 1643, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lawrence John Cheney родился в 1566 г. в местности лэмбурн, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Cusse, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Julian Waldron в 1588 г. в местности лэмбурн, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 2 ноября 1643 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности лэмбурн, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lawrence John Cheney nació en 1566, en Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord John De Cheney , V Earl of Lambough, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Cusse, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Julian Waldron en 1588, en Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 2 de noviembre de 1643, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Lambourn, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
